---
title: Home
body-classes: home-page
---

::: {.hero-shell}
::: {.hero-copy}
## Dr Dominik Tomaszuk {.hero-name}

Research in Semantic Web, Linked Data, graph databases, knowledge representation, RDF, Property Graphs, data interoperability, data integration, and data modeling.

I work on interoperability between RDF and Property Graphs, graph data conversion, schema languages, validation, and graph query language concepts.

::: {.hero-actions}
[Explore research](research.html){.hero-button}
[View publications](publications.html){.hero-button .hero-button-ghost}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-panel}
### Research interests

- Semantic Web
- Linked Data
- Graph Databases
- Knowledge Representation
- RDF
- Property Graphs
- Data Interoperability
- Data Integration
- Data Modeling
:::
:::

## Navigate the site

- [About](about.html) for profile and core research interests.
- [Research](research.html) for focus areas, project portfolio, and software.
- [Publications](publications.html) for articles, papers, and other research outputs.
- [Conferences](conferences.html) for conference-related content.
- [Service](service.html) for reviewing activity and program committee work.
- [Bio](bio.html) for a browser view and the downloadable PDF biography.
- [Contact](contact.html) for institutional address, email, and phone details.
